title: pulmonaria cevennensis
intro: Pulmonaria cevennensis, also known as Cevenne lungwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the Cevennes region in southern France and is valued for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate respiratory issues and soothe skin irritations. Pulmonaria cevennensis can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used as a decorative plant in gardens and indoor spaces due to its unique foliage and vibrant flowers.
